title: dalbergaria picta
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", dalbergaria picta benefits from the variety of pharmacological activities displayed by its neoflavonoids, including anti-osteoporosis, anti-inflammatory, antitumor, anti-androgen, anti-allergic, and antioxidation properties.
side_effects: Dalbergaria picta can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and stomach pain due to its toxic compounds. Ingesting large amounts of the plant can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even seizures in severe cases. The plant's alkaloids can also cause allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, respiratory problems, and anaphylaxis in susceptible individuals. If not used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional, the dalbergaria picta plant can result in serious health complications.
